game_name: Dragon Quest VI: Realms of Revelation

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Random encounters establish fundamental battle mechanics
Hero gradually gathers party members throughout adventure
Required defeats to progress story flags
Eight-level class progression unlocks hybrid classes and permanent stat bonuses
Unlocked after mastering 2-3 starter classes; builds on theme combinations
Unlocked via consumable books; advanced progression
Parallel world mechanic tied to plot revelation about dual-world threat
Optional hidden collectibles traded for items
Certain storyline events trigger only at night
World map character rotation system (returning feature)

typical_relief_triggers: Successful boss defeat progressing story flags
typical_tension_triggers: Story progression gates requiring specific defeats
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Traditional RPG pacing: gradual ability gating through class system, boss-punctuated story progression, optional content provides relief valves; amnesia plot creates narrative tension while mechanical progression offers steady advancement

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Mini medals hidden throughout worlds; bonus dungeons and extra characters after main storyline; optional class progression and mini-games
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Two secret classes (Dragon, Liquid Metal Slime) unlocked via consumable books; certain story events only occur at night requiring time-based exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic random encounters; party assembly phase; introduction to turn-based first-person combat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Boss monsters with story flags; class system acquisition at Alltrades Abbey; first-level class grinding; introduction to hybrid class unlocks
difficulty_curve.late_game: Advanced hybrid classes and secret class acquisition; Dream World exploration alongside Real World; dual-world threat escalation
notable_spikes: Alltrades Abbey class system unlock creates mandatory class grinding phase
Boss encounters punctuate story progression with significant difficulty gates
Dream World introduction signals narrative and mechanical complexity increase

notable_level_patterns.description: Real World and Dream World share similar but distinct maps; world-switching mechanic creates spatial puzzle-like progression where story forces navigation between parallel spaces
Alltrades Abbey serves as mid-game bottleneck where party must grind class battles to unlock hybrid classes; class mastery requirements create extended engagement loops
Specific boss monster defeats trigger story flags; bosses serve as mandatory difficulty gates separating narrative chapters
Mini medals, mini-games (Slime Arena, Best Dresser), casinos, and hidden areas provide optional relief from main campaign tension
